title: Dictionary Ores
description: Implements ores for OreDictionary reasons, and adds other stuff.
body:
# Adds 20 Ores:

1. Lead,

2. Silver,

3. Aluminum,

4. Tungsten,

5. Platinum,

6. Hardstone,

7. Glowstone Ore,

8. Crystal Cluster,

9. Ruby Ore,

10. Calamitanium Ore,

11. Uranium Ore,

12. Sapphire Ore,

13. Topaz Ore,

14. Amethyst Ore,

15. Lunite Ore,

16. XP Ore - Also generates in the nether,

17. Lithium Ore,

18. Copper Ore,

19. Tin Ore,

20. Magicite Ore - Only generates in the end dimension

 

# World Gen Additions -

Clay generates undergound

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

 

All the things here can be disabled in configs.

Tags for modpack makers:
https://github.com/Grainen/Dictionary-Ores/wiki/1.12.2-Getting-started

(I have decided to *almost* completely move to modrinth.)

1. > If you're looking to learn code or need source code for examples, use this projects source code. (Source code License: MIT License)
2. > You can use this in you're modpacks without giving credits.
